title: Melon Hunger Bar
description: Changes the hunger bar food to melon!
body:
This resource pack replaces the hunger bar with melon slices! Both the normal hunger bar and the hunger effect textures are included. The pack will be updated with every new Minecraft release.

Join the discord to give suggestions or report bugs!

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4feaf8ddfc4f31885cc7e776b22eea00e7f23485.png)
